description: POST /contexts response containing 'content_hash' echoed back from the request. The publish-response schema is CLOSED (additionalProperties: false; see acdp-publish-response.schema.json line 19 and the openness map in RFC-ACDP-0007 §3.3.1). Consumers MUST reject as schema_violation. Pairs with pub-007 which pins the exact five-field response shape.

expected.rationale: The publish response is exactly five fields. Echoing content_hash adds nothing — the producer already submitted and signed it — and accepting the echo would make consumers tolerant of registries that drift away from the spec shape. pub-007 lists every forbidden field; this fixture pins the most common drift in particular.
